response.original_title: Los Hijos De Camelia y Emilio
response.overview: In the ruthless world of organized crime, two powerful legacies are about to collide. Camelia and Emilio, the children of feared drug lords, have lived separate lives, unaware of each other’s existence.  Camelia, cold and strategic, has built her own empire, while Emilio operates with intelligence and control, preserving his father’s influence from the shadows. Both have inherited the power and instincts of their parents, but their paths have never crossed — until now.  When a growing conflict threatens to destabilize their territories, their worlds collide, forcing them into a violent struggle shaped by loyalty, betrayal, and hidden truths.  As they uncover secrets tied to their past and their families, Camelia and Emilio must decide whether to unite or destroy each other in a war where blood ties can be both a weapon and a weakness.
response.title: Los Hijos De Camelia y Emilio
